zh.lifeSummary: 當Agatha de Brus於大約1095年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素時，她的父親Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton34歲，母親Agnes de Surdeval26歲。她和Sir Hercules de Malebisse Sr.至少有1個兒子。她去世於1245年在英國英格蘭越可爾阿格萊巴恩比享年151歲，埋葬在英國越可爾斯卡波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agatha de Brus于大约1095年出生在英国英格兰越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素时，她的父亲Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton34岁，母亲Agnes de Surdeval26岁。她和Sir Hercules de Malebisse Sr.至少有1个儿子。她去世于1245年在英国英格兰越可爾阿格萊巴恩比享年151岁，埋葬在英国越可爾斯卡波洛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Slavic brus ‘whetstone’, presumably a metonymic occupational name for someone who honed or sharpened blades; possibly also a nickname for a clumsy or coarse fellow. Compare Bruss .
Slovenian: from an old dialect short form of the personal name Ambrož (see Ambrose ). Compare Bruss .
French: topographic name for someone living on a heath, from Occitan brusc ‘heather’, or a habitational name from (Le/Les) Brus, the name of several places in southern France.

variants.name: Bruss
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Eldor, Reinhard, Rudie, Wilhelm.
German (also Brüss): from a short form of the medieval personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).
Americanized or Germanized form of Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic)   Brus  , meaning ‘whetstone’ and, as a Slovenian name, also ‘Ambrose’.

nameMeanings.name: Agatha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Agnes   and   Agatha .

variants.name: Agnes
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Agatha de Brus was born about 1095, in Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton, was 34 and her mother, Agnes de Surdeval, was 26. She had at least 1 son with Sir Hercules de Malebisse Sr.. She died in 1245, in Ugglebarnby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 151, and was buried in Scarborough, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agatha de Brus est née environ 1095, à Skelton Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Surdeval, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sir Hercules de Malebisse Sr.. Elle est décédée en 1245, à Ugglebarnby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 151 ans, et a été enterrée à Scarborough, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England: Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Agatha de Brus um 1095 in Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton 34 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Surdeval 26. Sie hatte mit Sir Hercules de Malebisse Sr. mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1245 im Alter von 151 Jahren in Ugglebarnby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Scarborough, Yorkshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Agatha de Brusが約1095年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトン カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skeltonは34歳，母Agnes de Surdevalは26歳であった。彼女はSir Hercules de Malebisse Sr.との間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1245年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウググレバーンビーで151歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアスカーボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agatha de Brus(이)가 대략 1095년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스켈턴 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Surdeval(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Sir Hercules de Malebisse Sr.(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1245년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 우글레바른비에서 151세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 스카버루에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agatha de Brus родилась около 1095 г. в местности скелтон кастл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Surdeval, 26. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sir Hercules de Malebisse Sr. Она умерла в 1245 г. в местности углебарнби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 151 год и была похоронена в местности скарбороую, еркшир, Англия.
